notes: Every user-facing notification/email/push/toast in inventories/*.notification.json. Vars: channel (email|push|in-app|toast).

steps.title: Write and design {name} content
steps.description: Write {name} ({channel}) in the product voice per 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md: clear subject/title, one action, honest urgency; all strings through i18n keys from day one.
acceptance_criteria: copy reviewed against design language voice

steps.title: Implement {name} delivery
steps.description: Implement {name} on channel {channel} at {path}: trigger condition, template rendering, delivery with retry policy, and suppression rules (quiet hours, dedupe window).
acceptance_criteria: fires exactly once per trigger within the dedupe window

steps.title: User preference/opt-out for {name}
steps.description: Wire {name} into the notification preferences surface: per-category opt-out honored at send time, default per the product's consent posture.
acceptance_criteria: preference change takes effect without redeploy
